sql_array: CREATE TABLE job_history (EMPLOYEE_ID INTEGER, START_DATE DATE, JOB_TITLE VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO job_history (EMPLOYEE_ID, START_DATE, JOB_TITLE) VALUES (1, '2022-01-01', 'Engineer'), (2, NULL, 'Manager'), (3, '2023-01-01', NULL);
SELECT sprintf_iri('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, CAST(START_DATE AS VARCHAR)) AS job_uri FROM job_history WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID = 1;
SELECT * FROM job_history WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID IN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID FROM job_history WHERE JOB_TITLE = 'Manager' AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL);
SELECT sprintf_iri('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, CAST(NULLIF(JOB_TITLE, '') AS VARCHAR)) AS job_uri FROM job_history GROUP BY JOB_TITLE HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT A.EMPLOYEE_ID, A.START_DATE, A.JOB_TITLE FROM job_history A JOIN job_history B ON A.EMPLOYEE_ID = B.EMPLOYEE_ID AND A.START_DATE = B.START_DATE WHERE A.JOB_TITLE IS NOT NULL;
SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, COUNT(*) FROM job_history GROUP BY EMPLOYEE_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND MIN(START_DATE) < CURRENT_DATE;
CREATE TABLE temp_employee_data (ID INTEGER, NAME VARCHAR(100), DOB DATE);
INSERT INTO temp_employee_data (ID, NAME, DOB) VALUES (1, 'Alice', '1990-05-06'), (2, 'Bob', '1992-07-08'), (3, NULL, '1995-10-12');
SELECT sprintf_iri('http://example.com/employee/%s', COALESCE(NAME, 'Unknown')) AS employee_uri FROM temp_employee_data WHERE ID = 2;
SELECT sprintf_iri('http://example.com/employee/%d_%s', ID, CAST(DOB AS VARCHAR)) FROM temp_employee_data WHERE DOB IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ID DESC;
